name: 12"x9" Arch Vanity Mirror with Tray Brass Finish - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a touch of elegance to your space with the 12-Inch x 9-Inch Arch Vanity Mirror with Tray from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This freestanding mirror, featuring a graceful arched design, doubles as a practical accessory with its integrated tray. Crafted with an iron frame in a sophisticated antique brass finish, it offers a blend of glam style and function. With dimensions perfect for any countertop, it helps you check your reflection while applying makeup or before you head out.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
